<style>
*{ margin:0; padding:0;}
li,ul{ list-style-type:none;}
img,div{ border:none;}
.container{ width:40px ; height:40px;border-radius: 20px; overflow:hidden;  float: left; margin-right:20px;}
.container img{ height:36px;  width:36px; margin-left:2px; margin-top:4px;}
.face_0{ background-color:#2ea7e0;}
.face_1{ background-color:#13ae67;}
.face_2{ background-color:#dae000;}
.face_3{ background-color:#8fc31f;}
.face_4{ background-color:#00a29a;}
.face_5{ background-color:#036eb8;}
.face_6{ background-color:#95d4e5;}
.face_7{ background-color:#00b1bb;}
.face_8{ background-color:#eb651a;}
.face_9{ background-color:#c0add3;}
.face_10{ background-color:#8a4597;}
</style>
